signup.name: NAME
signup.inviteRequired: A valid invite link is required to join this community.
signup.contactAdmin: If you believe this is a mistake, please contact your administrator.

forgot.successMessage: IF AN ACCOUNT EXISTS, A RESET LINK HAS BEEN SENT.
forgot.checkEmail: CHECK YOUR EMAIL INBOX AND SPAM FOLDER.

errors.forgotIdentifierRequired: Please provide either an email or a username.
errors.forgotFailed: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.
errors.mobileSessionExpired: Mobile login session expired on web. Please restart login from the app.
errors.mobileRedirectMissing: Login verified, but app redirect was missing. Please restart from the app.
errors.passwordsMismatchDetail: Please make sure both passwords match.
errors.formInvalid: Some details look invalid. Please review the form and try again.
errors.detailsInvalid: Some details are invalid. Please review your information and try again.
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.emailExistsDetail: An account with this email already exists.
errors.inviteInvalid: Invite link is invalid or expired. Please request a new invite link.
errors.captchaFailed: Security verification failed. Please complete the captcha again and retry.
errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a little and try again.
errors.networkError: Network issue detected. Please check your connection (or disable VPN/ad-blocker) and try again.
errors.captchaLoadFailed: Security verification could not load. Please disable blockers/VPN and retry.
errors.captchaExpired: Security verification expired. Please complete it again.

solo.title: Solo Viewing
solo.desc: Pure focus. High fidelity. Minimalist immersion for the cinema purist.

party.title: Watch Parties
party.desc: Integrated video calls. React in real-time without leaving the frame.

sync.title: Real-Time Sync
sync.desc: Frame-perfect synchronization across every device. No lag, no spoilers.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordUppercase: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation.passwordSpecialChar: Password must contain at least one special character
validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
validation.usernameFormat: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.emailOrUsernameNeeded: Either email or username is required
